title: AI Hostel Mess Food Demand & Waste Prediction
desc: Built an ML model using historical meal data, attendance and event features to predict daily food prep quantities — reducing waste and costs for hostel mess management at LPU. Includes Student and Admin dashboards.

title: DonateSphere – Crowdfunding Platform
desc: Full-stack MERN crowdfunding platform for campaign creation and donation tracking with JWT authentication. Frontend deployed on Vercel, backend on Render.

title: TheBeing Seller – Trading Solutions Platform
desc: Live trading dashboard with real-time Nifty/BankNifty bias, IST-aware session UI, risk calculators, and lead-gen CTAs — delivered as a freelance client project.

title: Food Junction – Food E-Commerce Website
desc: Responsive food ordering platform showcasing menu items, chefs, and brand-aligned homepage design with a clean, appetizing user interface.
